name: Microwaved Norwegian Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the apples in an 8-inch microwave-safe dish.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients; spoon equal portions into and over each apple half.
3. Microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish after 3 minutes (or use the turntable).
4. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand for 3 minutes.
Note: Time based on a 650-watt oven; adjust time for different wattage ovens.
